title: Reusable Logo
sourceTitle: Aurora Run Lab Mark Design AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable logo mark with minimal logo mark with simple geometry, strong silhouette, and scalable brand clarity. Create a single original Minimal Storybook Silhouette Logo. Avoid: cartoon style, complex illustration, busy scene, mascot logo, childish sticker look, 3D, gradients, realistic shading, messy typography, gener. Final result: A clean, poetic, minimal silhouette logo suitable for a children's brand, storybook project, lifestyle studio, art brand, or gentle cre. Brand Name: LUMA TALES. Brand Type: children-friendly story studio. Core Symbol: small open book forming a rising moon. Silhouette Story: one tiny child silhouette reading under a curved tree branch. Palette: warm black, paper white, soft gold, and muted sky blue. Usage Context: app icon, book spine, social avatar, and small watermark. Fictional Brand: AURORA RUN LAB. Product Category: fictional limited-edition trail sneaker. Subject: Make LUMA TALES the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a pure presentation field suitable for an icon, avatar, brand mark, favicon, or small watermark test. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use centered scalable mark with strong silhouette, clean negative space, and readable geometry at small size. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in flat vector or minimal symbolic design with crisp edges, restrained detail, and strong brand recall. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use warm black, paper white, soft gold, and muted sky blue. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
